subtitle.en: pit vipers, boas, and pythons have a heat-sensitive pit between eye and nostril — TRPA1 ion channels in the membrane fire at 5 mK above ambient, building a thermal image of warm prey
subtitle.ko: Pit viper·boa·python의 눈-콧구멍 사이 열 감각기 — TRPA1이 주변 +5 mK에 발화, 따뜻한 먹이 열영상

description.en: Thermal-image radial glow around warm prey, brightness scales with ΔT. Demonstrates 5 mK threshold of snake IR sensing.
description.ko: 따뜻한 먹이 주위 thermal radial glow, ΔT에 비례. 뱀 IR 감지 5 mK 임계.
